Keywords: hover, lift, elevate, card, button, feedback
CSS Code: .hover-lift { transition: transform 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease; } .hover-lift:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); }
.fade-in { animation: fadeIn 300ms ease forwards; } @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; } }

Keywords: slide, up, reveal, scroll, entrance, enter
CSS Code: .slide-up { animation: slideUp 400ms ease forwards; } @keyframes slideUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
.slide-in-right { animation: slideInRight 300ms ease forwards; } @keyframes slideInRight { from { transform: translateX(100%); } to { transform: translateX(0); } }

Keywords: scale, pop, grow, expand, button, click
CSS Code: .scale-pop { transition: transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); } .scale-pop:hover { transform: scale(1.05); }
.pulse { animation: pulse 2s infinite; } @keyframes pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.5; } }
.spin { animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite; } @keyframes spin { from { transform: rotate(0deg); } to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
.bounce { animation: bounce 0.5s ease; } @keyframes bounce { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); } 50% { transform: translateY(-10px); } }

.shimmer { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f0f0f0 25%, #e0e0e0 50%, #f0f0f0 75%); background-size: 200% 100%; animation: shimmer 1.5s infinite; } @keyframes shimmer { from { background-position: 200% 0; } to { background-position: -200% 0; } }
.scroll-reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); transition: opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease; } .scroll-reveal.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
.parallax { will-change: transform; transform: translateZ(0); } Use JS: element.style.transform = `translateY(${scrollY * speed}px)`;

Keywords: gradient, flow, aurora, mesh, animated, background
CSS Code: .gradient-flow { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); background-size: 200% 200%; animation: gradientFlow 8s ease infinite; } @keyframes gradientFlow { 0% { background-position: 0% 50%; } 50% { background-position: 100% 50%; } 100% { background-position: 0% 50%; } }
Best For: Hero backgrounds, aurora effects, creative sections

CSS Code: .glow-pulse { box-shadow: 0 0 20px var(--glow-color); animation: glowPulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes glowPulse { 0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 20px var(--glow-color); } 50% { box-shadow: 0 0 40px var(--glow-color); } }

.typing { overflow: hidden; border-right: 2px solid var(--color-primary); white-space: nowrap; animation: typing 3s steps(40) forwards, blinkCursor 0.75s step-end infinite; } @keyframes typing { from { width: 0; } to { width: 100%; } } @keyframes blinkCursor { from, to { border-color: transparent; } 50% { border-color: var(--color-primary); } }
Best For: Hero headlines, AI chat, code displays

CSS Code: .fold { max-height: 0; overflow: hidden; transition: max-height 300ms ease; } .fold.open { max-height: 1000px; }
.card-flip { perspective: 1000px; } .card-flip-inner { transition: transform 0.6s; transform-style: preserve-3d; } .card-flip.flipped .card-flip-inner { transform: rotateY(180deg); }

.stagger-child { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); animation: fadeInUp 0.3s ease forwards; } .stagger-child:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.05s; } .stagger-child:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.1s; } .stagger-child:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.15s; }

.ripple { position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .ripple-effect { position: absolute; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); transform: scale(0); animation: ripple 0.6s linear; } @keyframes ripple { to { transform: scale(4); opacity: 0; } }
.morph { transition: d 0.4s ease, fill 0.4s ease; } Use CSS clip-path: polygon() or SVG path morphing.
Best For: Premium UI, liquid effects, creative sections

CSS Code: .float { animation: float 3s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes float { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); } 50% { transform: translateY(-10px); } }
Best For: Decorative elements, ambient motion, hero accents
